underlying_goal: Create a parallel agent team of two code reviewers that review different parts of the codebase and document their findings in markdown files
friction_detail: Task agent output files were empty, preventing user from reviewing teammate thinking processes, and Claude initially claimed tasks were still running when they had already completed.
brief_summary: User wanted a parallel agent team to review code and produce markdown findings; the findings were generated but the task output/transcript files were empty, and Claude incorrectly reported tasks as still running.
